Directives in package main warn and are ignored; generation continues.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

//fabrik:http GET /main
func InMain(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrick:hook setup
func TypoInMain() {}

//fabrik:http:group /main
type InMainGroup struct{}

//fabrik:http:static /main
var inMainVar int

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Providers
		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", web.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
-- want/diags --
warning: main.go:8:1: //fabrik:http in package main is ignored
  help: move it to a subpackage
warning: main.go:11:1: suspicious directive prefix "fabrick:" (did you mean "fabrik:"?)
  help: example: //fabrik:hook setup
warning: main.go:14:1: //fabrik:http:group in package main is ignored
  help: move it to a subpackage
warning: main.go:17:1: //fabrik:http:static in package main is ignored
  help: move it to a subpackage
